reason_thou:
### 1. Understanding the Issue ###
The assertion failure occurs because the VPlan cost model and the legacy cost model disagree on the best vectorization factor (VF). Specifically, the `BestFactor.Width` (8) does not match the `LegacyVF.Width` (4), and the additional conditions in the assertion (e.g., `PlanForEarlyExitLoop` or `planContainsAdditionalSimplifications`) are not satisfied.

### 2. Analyzing `opt`'s Log ###
The `opt` log indicates that the loop has an unpredictable backedge-taken count, which complicates vectorization. The Scalar Evolution analysis shows that `%select.next` is variant, and the loop's trip count depends on `%n`. This unpredictability likely affects the cost models' decisions.

### 3. Root Cause Analysis ###
The disagreement arises because the VPlan-based cost model and the legacy cost model evaluate the loop differently. The `planContainsAdditionalSimplifications` function checks if the VPlan includes optimizations not accounted for in the legacy model. However, the debugger reveals that this function cannot resolve certain symbols (e.g., `SeenInstrs`), suggesting incomplete or incorrect context setup during the assertion check.

### 4. Proposed Edit Points ###
Edit the assertion at lines 7579-7584 in `llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp` to include additional debugging information. This will help identify why the conditions fail:

```cpp
assert((BestFactor.Width == LegacyVF.Width || PlanForEarlyExitLoop ||
        planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(BestFactor.Width),
                                              CostCtx, OrigLoop) ||
        planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(LegacyVF.Width),
                                              CostCtx, OrigLoop)) &&
       "VPlan cost model and legacy cost model disagreed.\n"
       "BestFactor.Width: " << BestFactor.Width << ", LegacyVF.Width: " << LegacyVF.Width << "\n"
       "PlanForEarlyExitLoop: " << PlanForEarlyExitLoop);
```

### 5. Conclusion ###
The proposed change adds detailed debugging output to the assertion, providing insights into the values of `BestFactor.Width`, `LegacyVF.Width`, and `PlanForEarlyExitLoop`. This will help diagnose the root cause of the disagreement between the cost models.
test_traj:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
index 4d2df9179aa3..73da6b58d003 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
@@ -7581,7 +7581,9 @@ VectorizationFactor LoopVectorizationPlanner::computeBestVF() {
                                                 CostCtx, OrigLoop) ||
           planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(LegacyVF.Width),
                                                 CostCtx, OrigLoop)) &&
-         " VPlan cost model and legacy cost model disagreed");
+         "VPlan cost model and legacy cost model disagreed.\n"
+         "BestFactor.Width: " << BestFactor.Width << ", LegacyVF.Width: " << LegacyVF.Width << "\n"
+         "PlanForEarlyExitLoop: " << PlanForEarlyExitLoop);
   assert((BestFactor.Width.isScalar() || BestFactor.ScalarCost > 0) &&
          "when vectorizing, the scalar cost must be computed.");
 #endif
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
index 4d2df9179aa3..5c7df508dc4d 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/LoopVectorize.cpp
@@ -7576,12 +7576,22 @@ VectorizationFactor LoopVectorizationPlanner::computeBestVF() {
       BestPlan.getVectorLoopRegion() &&
       BestPlan.getVectorLoopRegion()->getSingleSuccessor() !=
           BestPlan.getMiddleBlock();
-  assert((BestFactor.Width == LegacyVF.Width || PlanForEarlyExitLoop ||
+  #include "llvm/Support/raw_ostream.h"
+
+assert((BestFactor.Width == LegacyVF.Width || PlanForEarlyExitLoop ||
           planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(BestFactor.Width),
                                                 CostCtx, OrigLoop) ||
           planContainsAdditionalSimplifications(getPlanFor(LegacyVF.Width),
                                                 CostCtx, OrigLoop)) &&
-         " VPlan cost model and legacy cost model disagreed");
+         ([&]() {
+           std::string BestFactorStr, LegacyVFStr;
+           llvm::raw_string_ostream BFStream(BestFactorStr), LVFStream(LegacyVFStr);
+           BFStream << BestFactor.Width;
+           LVFStream << LegacyVF.Width;
+           return "VPlan cost model and legacy cost model disagreed.\n"
+                  "BestFactor.Width: " + BFStream.str() + ", LegacyVF.Width: " + LVFStream.str() + "\n"
+                  "PlanForEarlyExitLoop: " + std::to_string(PlanForEarlyExitLoop);
+         }()).c_str());
   assert((BestFactor.Width.isScalar() || BestFactor.ScalarCost > 0) &&
          "when vectorizing, the scalar cost must be computed.");
 #endif
